steps.title: Sort the prices
steps.content:
Put the five gas prices in order from least to greatest.
$$3.609,\ 3.679,\ 3.699,\ 3.729,\ 3.729$$

steps.title: Choose the middle value
steps.content: With $5$ values, the median is the third value in the ordered list.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The median command gives the same middle price. The answer is C.
